name: Caquan "Cue" Palmer
headline: Software Architect | AI Systems Engineer | Drone Operations | Founder, MAE MegaCorp
bio: Software architect, AI systems integrator, and drone operations specialist. Built MAE (Modular Adaptive Entity) as a permanent tactical AI copilot — a real-time command interface integrating Anthropic Claude, Perplexity Sonar, and persistent memory across web, mobile, and desktop platforms. Through MAE MegaCorp, delivering AI consulting, drone aerial services, and custom software solutions.

experience.description: AI-powered software solutions, drone aerial services, and systems integration. Built the MAE Tactical Interface — multi-platform AI copilot with real-time WebSocket communication, persistent memory, and cross-platform deployment.
Certified UAV operator specializing in cinematic aerial photography and videography. 4K/60fps production with Google Drive cloud delivery workflows.
Full-stack applications across Java (Spring Boot 3.x, Java 21), Python (Flask, FastAPI), and JavaScript. REST APIs, WebSocket systems, cloud deployment, and AI/LLM integration.
Early adoption of large language model APIs into production workflows. Custom system prompts, tool-use pipelines, and context management strategies.
